scripts.setup: node -e "require('fs').existsSync('.env') || (console.error('Missing .env file — copy .env.example to .env'), process.exit(1))" && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('allure-results', {recursive: true, force: true})" && node src/configs/utils/allure-env.js
scripts.test: wdio run src/configs/wdio.conf.js && npm run allure:generate || npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:bdd: wdio run src/configs/wdio.cucumber.conf.js && npm run allure:generate || npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:all: wdio run src/configs/wdio.conf.js && wdio run src/configs/wdio.cucumber.conf.js && npm run allure:generate || npm run allure:generate
scripts.test:check: npm run setup && wdio run src/configs/wdio.conf.js
scripts.allure:generate: allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && echo 'Open: npm run allure:open'
